free_text: Reaction 48Ca(p,n)48Sc from Ep = 1.885 to 5.1 MeV
Details of
experimental technique given.
The enriched 48Ca target in the
0.042% 43Ca and 0.66% 44Ca) deposited on a thick (~ 2
mm) Ta backing. The target thickness as determined
from the low energy alpha backscattering technique
was about 1 keV for 1.5 MeV protons.
No detail information given except the contributions
originating from 13C and 17,18O is expected to be
negligible because of their lower abundance and/or
larger negative Qp,n values.
Due to the poor quality of the figures, the data
extracted by the digitizer may not be very accurate.
The absolute error in the measurement is estimated to
be ~ +- 15%. No detail information on the sources of
uncertainties given.
Compiled by Lalhmingmawia
S.Kailas: Data are no longer available
Plotted in Figures 1 and 2 of J,PRM,19,(6),565,
